headline: GE Vernova Lands 100 MW India Wind Deal
summary: GE Vernova will supply 28 onshore wind turbines for Powerica's Botad wind farm in Gujarat.

headline: GE Vernova to supply 28 wind turbines for Powerica’s Gujarat project
summary: The order marks the first deployment of GE Vernova’s 3.8MW turbine model in the Indian market.

headline: GE Vernova Wins 100 MW Wind Turbine Contract for Gujarat Project (GEV)
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) has secured a new wind energy contract in India through an agreement with Powerica Limited to supply turbines for a 100 MW wind farm development in the state of Gujarat.

raw.headline: GE Vernova Wins 100 MW Wind Turbine Contract for Gujarat Project (GEV)

headline: This Week In Energy Transition - SunPower's Strategic Share Move Fuels Financial Flexibility
summary: SunPower Inc., a prominent player in the solar technology and services industry, has announced a strategic move to offer bonus shares instead of cash interest for upcoming payments on its Convertible Senior Notes. This approach, aimed at providing the company with increased financial flexibility, aligns with their ongoing efforts to support energy transition goals. As SunPower continues to help customers shift toward more energy-efficient solutions, this proposal indicates a commitment to...
